subtopics.title: Running Events
common_misconceptions: Only fast people should do athletics
subtopics.teaching_note: Sprints: short distances (100m, 200m, 400m). Explosive start from blocks. Middle distance: 800m, 1500m (requires pacing). Relay: 4 × 100m, 4 × 400m. Baton exchange in designated zone. Hurdles: jumping over barriers without knocking them down. Technique: arm action opposite to legs, lean forward at finish. Safety: warm up before exercise, cool down after, proper footwear. Nigerian athletes: Tobi Amusan (world record holder, 100m hurdles).
